title: Craftable Nether Star Recipe
description: Lets you craft the Nether Star and avoid the Wrath of The Vengeful Wither!!!
body:
# Craftable Nether Star Recipe

**Beacon Power, No Boss Battle**

Sick of summoning the Wither just to get a single Nether Star? Same. This datapack lets you skip the chaos and craft the core of your beacon empire — no soul sand, no stress.

Note: “Nether Star Recipe” is a custom recipe added by the datapack.If you are interested in more Datapcks Check out the links at the end of the description. 

**🧠 Why It’s Better**

Because building brilliance shouldn’t require a deathmatch. Whether you're lighting up your base, boosting your speed, or just flexing your wealth, this pack gives you the star without the scars.

**📦 How to Use:**

1. Download the .zip
 
2. Drop it into your world’s datapacks/ folder
 
3. Type /reload in-game
 
4. Craft your beacon dreams
   --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
